monitors_configured.method: Task accuracy on labelled eval set
API spend per day / per request

key_strengths: Excellent IQ dimension coverage — API reliability, latency, cost all well-monitored
Drift detection identifies input distribution shifts
Model registry enables version tracking and rollback
key_limitations: No semantic quality monitoring — SF dimension almost entirely blind
No NLI-based faithfulness evaluation — hallucination undetectable
No explanation quality metrics — TI dimension not addressed
No prompt injection or adversarial robustness testing
No toxicity or PII monitoring in standard configuration
Drift detection operates on statistical features, not semantic content
Performance tracking requires labelled eval set — expensive to maintain
No context window quality assessment for RAG pipelines
adaptation_notes: MLflow configured with built-in drift detection and performance tracking. Custom metrics added for LLM-specific concerns where MLflow plugins available.
